name: Mobile Sorting Within Filters
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure mobile sorting options within the filter interface to help mobile shoppers easily organize products by price, popularity, or other criteria. This mobile-optimized approach consolidates sorting and filtering in one intuitive location, improving the browsing experience for smartphone users."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Integrating sorting within the mobile filter panel creates a more streamlined interface for mobile shoppers, who represent a significant portion of ecommerce traffic. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By reducing the complexity of navigation on smaller screens, you help mobile customers find products more efficiently, which can help improve mobile conversion rates and reduce bounce rates from frustrated users."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This documentation outlines the process of integrating sorting functionality within mobile filters. By following these steps, you can enhance the user experience and streamline navigation on mobile devices."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Instructions**"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Modify\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-toolbar-mobile.liquid", "code": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Locate the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-toolbar-mobile.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Remove the code block responsible for rendering the sorting functionality within the mobile toolbar."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSX"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "
{% render 'findify-sorting' , options: sort_options , default: default_sort_by , selected: sort_by , is_modal: true %}
", "code": true}]}], "lang": "yaml"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Update CSS Styles in\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-grid.css", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add the provided CSS styles to\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-grid.css", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to ensure proper alignment and styling for the mobile search header toolbar."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "CSS"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ".findify-search-header-toolbar { justify-content: center;}.findify-search-header-toolbar-actions { margin: 15px 0 0;}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "css"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Adjust CSS Styles in\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-filter.css", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Modify the existing CSS styles in the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-filter.css", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file to optimize the layout and appearance of mobile filters."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "CSS"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "@media (max-width: 768px) { .findify-filters-sidebar.open { flex-direction: column; } .findify-filters-sidebar .findify-filters-wrapper { flex: 1; } .findify-filters-sidebar .findify-filters-container { width: 100%; } .findify-filters-sidebar .findify-modal-footer { order: 3; } .findify-filters-sidebar .findify-filters-wrapper { order: 2; } .findify-filters-sidebar .findify-sorting-wrapper { order: 1; } .findify-filters-sidebar .findify-sorting.desktop { display: block; margin: 37px 22px; } .findify-filters-sidebar .findify-sorting-btn { width: 250px; } .findify-sorting.open .findify-sorting-list { width: 250px; }}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "css"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 4: Modify\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-grid-search.liquid", "code": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Within the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-grid-search.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file, locate the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-filters-sidebar", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0element."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Add a sorting block wrapped by the\u00a0"}, {"text": ".findify-sorting-wrapper", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0class."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSX"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "
// code
{% render 'findify-sorting', options: sort_options, default: default_sort_by, selected: sort_by, is_modal: false %}
", "code": true}]}], "lang": "twig"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 5: Additional CSS Styles for Horizontal Filters"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you use horizontal filters, add the provided CSS code to adjust the layout of the filters container."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "CSS"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "#findify-search-main[data-template=\"horizontal\"] .findify-filters-sidebar > .findify-filters-container { flex-direction: row;}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "css"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By following these instructions and integrating the provided code snippets, you can seamlessly incorporate sorting functionality within mobile filters, optimizing the user experience for Shopify merchants using our app."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us on\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
